sentences.target: Ich tippe jetzt rück- ins Feld.

translations.de: Ich tippe jetzt rück- ins Feld.
translations.es: Ahora escribo rück- en el campo.
translations.fr: Je tape rück- dans le champ.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在往输入框里输入rück-。
translations.ru: Я сейчас ввожу rück- в поле.
translations.pt: Agora estou digitando rück- no campo.
translations.he: אני מקליד עכשיו את rück- בשדה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhập rück- vào ô.
translations.ar: أنا أكتب الآن rück- في الحقل.
translations.nl: Ik typ nu rück- in het veld.
translations.hu: Most beírom a rück- kódot a mezőbe.
translations.hi: मैं अभी फ़ील्ड में rück- टाइप कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Τώρα πληκτρολογώ το rück- στο πεδίο.
translations.nb: Nå skriver jeg inn rück- i feltet.
translations.id: Sekarang saya mengetik rück- di kolom.
translations.sv: Nu skriver jag in rück- i fältet.
translations.da: Nu skriver jeg rück- i feltet.
translations.ja: 今、入力欄にrück-を入力しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); denotes the typing action.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb ('tippe').
Prefix fragment used as a literal string; syntactic direct object (what is being typed).
Orthographic contraction of 'in das'; preposition marking direction into a location and incorporating the article.
Common noun (neuter), object of the preposition 'ins' (accusative complement).
Definite article (masculine nominative) modifying 'Code'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a predicate complement indicating content.
Hyphenated string used as the value/content; complement of 'lautet'.

sentences.target: Auf dem Karton steht rück- in Rot.
sentences.reading: /aʊf deːm kaʁˈtoːn ʃteːt ʁʏk ɪn ʁoːt/

translations.de: Auf dem Karton steht rück- in Rot.
translations.ipa: /aʊf deːm kaʁˈtoːn ʃteːt ʁʏk ɪn ʁoːt/
translations.en: “rück-” is printed on the box in red.
translations.es: En la caja aparece rück- en rojo.
translations.fr: Sur le carton, rück- est imprimé en rouge.
translations.it: Sulla scatola c’è scritto rück- in rosso.
translations.yue: 紙箱上印有紅色嘅 rück-。
translations.ru: На коробке красным цветом напечатано rück-.
translations.pt: Na caixa está impresso rück- em vermelho.
translations.tr: Kutunun üzerinde kırmızı renkte rück- basılmış.
translations.vi: Trên thùng có in chữ rück- màu đỏ.
translations.ar: على الكرتون مطبوع rück- باللون الأحمر.
translations.nl: Op de doos staat rück- in het rood.
translations.hu: A dobozon pirossal van rányomtatva a rück-.
translations.hi: डिब्बे पर लाल रंग में rück- छपा है.
translations.pl: Na kartonie wydrukowano rück- na czerwono.
translations.el: Στο κουτί είναι τυπωμένο το rück- με κόκκινο χρώμα.
translations.nb: På kartongen er rück- trykt i rødt.
translations.id: Di kotak tercetak rück- berwarna merah.
translations.sv: På kartongen står det rück- i rött.
translations.ro: Pe cutie este tipărit rück- cu roșu.
translations.cs: Na krabici je vytištěno rück- červeně.
translations.da: På kassen er rück- trykt i rødt.
translations.ja: 箱に赤色でrück-が印刷されています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article (dative singular) within the prepositional phrase headed by 'Auf'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'Auf' (dative).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes that something is printed/written.
Prefix fragment used as a literal string; the content that 'steht' on the box (logical subject/content).
Preposition introducing a manner/color phrase.
Color noun; object of the preposition 'in' indicating the color.

sentences.target: Sie markieren alles mit rück- für Rücksendungen.
sentences.reading: /ziː maʁˈkiːʁən ˈaləs mɪt ʁʏk fyːɐ̯ ˈʁʏksɛndʊŋən/

translations.de: Sie markieren alles mit rück- für Rücksendungen.
translations.ipa: /ziː maʁˈkiːʁən ˈaləs mɪt ʁʏk fyːɐ̯ ˈʁʏksɛndʊŋən/
translations.en: They mark everything with “rück-” for returns.
translations.es: Marcan todo con rück- para las devoluciones.
translations.fr: Ils étiquettent tout avec rück- pour les retours.
translations.it: Etichettano tutto con rück- per i resi.
translations.ko: 반품용으로 모든 것에 rück- 표시를 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把所有退货都标记为rück-。
translations.yue: 佢哋會為退貨全部標記為 rück-。
translations.ru: Они помечают всё как rück- для возвратов.
translations.pt: Eles marcam tudo com rück- para devoluções.
translations.he: הם מסמנים הכל עם rück- להחזרות.
translations.tr: İadeler için her şeyi rück- ile işaretliyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đánh dấu mọi thứ bằng rück- cho hàng trả lại.
translations.ar: هم يضعون علامة rück- على كل شيء من أجل المرتجعات.
translations.nl: Ze markeren alles met rück- voor retouren.
translations.uk: Вони позначають усе як rück- для повернень.
translations.hu: Mindent a visszaküldésekhez rück- felirattal jelölik.
translations.hi: वापसी के लिए वे हर चीज़ पर rück- का निशान लगाते हैं.
translations.pl: Wszystko oznaczają jako rück- na zwroty.
translations.el: Σημειώνουν τα πάντα με rück- για τις επιστροφές.
translations.nb: De merker alt med rück- for returer.
translations.id: Mereka menandai semuanya dengan rück- untuk pengembalian.
translations.sv: De märker allt med rück- för returer.
translations.ro: Ei marchează totul cu rück- pentru retururi.
translations.cs: Všechno označují jako rück- pro vrácení.
translations.da: De markerer alt med rück- til retur.
translations.fi: He merkitsevät kaiken palautuksia varten merkinnällä rück-.
translations.ja: 返品用としてすべてにrück-の印を付けています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (ambiguous between 3rd person plural and formal 2nd person).
Finite main verb (present); denotes the marking action.
Indefinite pronoun; direct object of 'markieren'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative phrase.

Preposition marking purpose.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'für' indicating purpose.
